title: agrostis paulsenii
intro: Agrostis paulsenii, also known as Paulsen's bent grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. Native to the mountainous regions of the western United States, Agrostis paulsenii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Agrostis paulsenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
